REPORTED. COMPLEX LITIGATION DEFENDANT'S PETITION TO ENFORCE CLASS ACTION WAIVER, COMPEL ARBITRATION, AND REQUEST STAY OF PROCEEDINGS HELD ON APR-28-2025 AT 1:30PM IN DEPT 606. THE COURT AND COUNSEL CONFER. A TENTATIVE RULING WAS PREVIOUSLY CIRCULATED PRIOR TO THIS HEARING. ARGUMENTS HEARD IN COURT BY BOTH COUNSEL. JUDICIAL OFFICER RULES ON BENCH THAT THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANT'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION, DISMISSES THE CLASS CLAIMS, AND STAYS THE CASE ON PLAINTIFF'S PAGA REPRESENTATIVE CLAIM. WRITTEN ORDER TO FOLLOW THESE PROCEEDINGS. JUDGE JEFFREY S. ROSS; REPORTER ANGEL LOVE, CSR #13845, TEL NO. (559) 430-6547, EMAIL: ANGELLOVEREPORTING@GMAIL.COM; CLERK EDWARD SANTOS; DEPT 606.
